business_objective.summary: A manufacturer of professional cleaning products needed to establish regular supply agreements with hotels in the New York to Virginia region. The goal was to book meetings with decision-makers who control purchasing budgets and operational supply chains.
business_objective.goal: Hotels between New York and Virginia to book meetings with procurement and housekeeping managers.

target_profile.geographic_scope: New York, New Jersey, Pennsylvania, Maryland, Virginia (urban and resort areas)

communication_flow: Verified hotel list created (region-based, 3-5 star properties)
Decision-maker roles identified and mapped (procurement, housekeeping, operations)
Location + persona targeted visibility (LinkedIn, Google Ads, role-specific landing pages)
Platform expansion (Meta, Instagram for broader reach)
Direct outreach escalation (email templates, phone scripts for non-responders)

list_size.note: Verified hotel locations with addresses and contact information

decision_maker_coverage.note: Percentage of hotels with identified decision-maker roles

meeting_requests.note: Confirmed meeting requests from target roles

timeframe_days.note: Time from campaign start to first meeting bookings

notes: Used as primary public case study. Numbers rounded for external use. No brand names included.
